summary: Iteration 43: Comprehensive testing of TemaDom v6.5-6.8 features - Theme System, Professions Page UI Fix, and Active Leaderboard. All features tested and verified working. Backend APIs pass 100%, Frontend theme toggle, persistence, and page contrast all working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/leaderboard/clients - Returns ranked list of clients
✅ GET /api/leaderboard/firms - Returns ranked list of firms/masters
✅ Theme switches between dark and light mode on click
✅ Theme persisted in localStorage as 'temadom-theme' key
✅ Light mode: Text color rgb(15, 23, 42) on light background - readable
✅ Dark mode: Text color rgb(248, 250, 252) on dark background - readable
✅ Expanded sections show proper contrast in both themes
✅ Points config displayed (Регистрация +10, Нов проект +20, etc.)
✅ Theme toggle works on leaderboard page
✅ Both light and dark mode show proper contrast
critical_code_review_comments: 1. ThemeContext uses localStorage key 'temadom-theme' and applies html.light-mode class
2. CSS variables (--td-bg-page, --td-bg-nav, etc.) properly defined in index.css for both themes
3. ProfessionsPage uses useTheme() hook and applies theme-aware inline styles
4. LeaderboardPage uses useTheme() hook for proper theming
6. Registration automatically awards 10 points in server.py line 122-128
7. Create project awards 20 points in server.py line 265-271
8. Portfolio add awards 10 points in server.py line 478-484
9. Leave review awards 15 points in server.py line 558-564
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest: testlead_*, testaward_* (auto-cleanup via unique emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 tested Theme System (v6.5), Professions Page UI (v6.8), and Leaderboard with points system. Key test IDs: theme-toggle, professions-page, profession-{id}, leaderboard-page, tab-clients, tab-firms, leaderboard-row-{N}, nav-leaderboard. Theme stored in localStorage as 'temadom-theme'. Leaderboard API routes are at /api/leaderboard/*. Points config: register=10, create_project=20, complete_project=50, leave_review=15, receive_review=10, portfolio_add=10, daily_login=2, referral=30.
